feed.title: Steam
feed.subtitle: Combined Steam news feed: the global Steam news feed plus selected games and groups, from Steam's native news RSS.

entry.title: Crisol studio lays off all employees less than 6 months after launch, warns that full closure is a 'feasible possibility'
entry.content: Less than six months after the release of the survival horror shooter Crisol: Theater of Idols , developer Vermila Studios appears to be in trouble. The studio has not officially closed, as one former employee had claimed, but CEO David Carrasco confirmed that employees have been let go and that a full shutdown "is a feasible possibility.".. Read more.
entry.dc:creator: PC Gamer

entry.title: Early '90s animation tools were so primitive that Doom's lead artist says he pretty much did the whole thing with 'the undo key'
entry.content: Human ingenuity is a powerful—sometimes terrifying—thing. Throughout history, no matter how basic the tools available to us, we have always found a way to build the weird obsessions that appear in our minds. You know, like Stonehenge, or the Pyramids, or Doom (1993)... Read more.
entry.dc:creator: PC Gamer

entry.title: Try the Korean War “Black Thursday” Event!
entry.content: The confrontation between North and South Korea that began in 1950 quickly escalated into a large-scale conflict, with the USSR and China supporting one side, and the USA, Great Britain, and several other nations backing the other. The war marked the first time jet aircraft were used on a massive scale. American B-29 Superfortress bombers dominated the Korean skies, but soon they met a new challenge: Soviet MiG-15 fighter jets! On April 12nd 1951, B-29 bombers escorted by American fighters heade
entry.dc:creator: Steam News

entry.title: [Urgent Notice] Game Shutdown When Equipping Unpurchased DLC
entry.content: Hello, this is the DragonSword : Awakening team. We are writing to inform you of an issue we have identified in-game. ■ The Issue DLC that has not been purchased is currently being displayed as if it were owned, and equipping it triggers an abnormal pop-up that shuts down the game. Specifically: DLC items such as costumes and familiars are being shown as equippable in-game, even when they have not been purchased. Attempting to equip such a costume or mount such a familiar causes an abnormal pop-
entry.dc:creator: Steam News

entry.title: [Notice] Some DLC Not Displaying in Store — Under Investigation
entry.content: Hello, this is the DragonSword : Awakening team. We are aware of an issue where some DLC items are not displaying properly on the store and cannot currently be purchased . This issue is pending fix , and we will provide a separate notice once it has been resolved. ■ Affected DLC Costume: Black-Dyed Vestment Familiar: Exploration Squad Griffon We apologize for the inconvenience. We are working to resolve this as quickly as possible. Thank you. — The DragonSword : Awakening Team

entry.title: The new Warhammer Blood Bowl published by Slitherine will be out in fall, and I'm looking forward to it because I enjoy pain I guess
entry.content: t this point being into the digital versions of Blood Bowl is basically masochism. In the 1990s MicroLeague published a version that was so cheap and nasty I said , "to call it barebones would be an insult to skeletons." Cyanide picked up the licence after that, releasing two decent adaptations whose DLC model was controversial at the time but seems blessedly sensible compared to Blood Bowl 3, a live-service seasonal microtransaction confusatron that's basically a poster child for "look how they
entry.dc:creator: PC Gamer

entry.title: Faker becomes an honorary Korean police officer to help discourage online gambling
entry.content: Lee Sang-hyeok, better known to his fans as Faker, is perhaps the most enduring and successful esports pro of all time, with—among a great many other honors—a record six League of Legends world championships to his name stretching back to 2013. When he re-signed with T1 in 2022, the team called him the " Unkillable Demon King ," and fair enough because he went on to claim three of his six world titles—among a great many more honors—in an undefeated three-year stretch from 2023-25. entry.dc:creator: PC Gamer

entry.title: Od teraz listy życzeń na Steam obsługują kategorie i nie tylko
entry.content: Z tak wieloma niesamowitymi grami na Steam gracze dodają na swoje listy życzeń coraz więcej tytułów. Istniejące opcje takie jak kolejność i filtrowanie są świetne, ale gracze prosili o jeszcze więcej sposobów zarządzania listami życzeń na platformie. Dzisiaj dodajemy do listy życzeń kategoryzację, a także ulepszone wyszukiwanie i udostępnianie jej. Aby dowiedzieć się więcej, przeczytajcie pełny wpis poniżej, a potem wypróbujcie wszystkie nowe narzędzia na swojej własnej liście życzeń . Kategorie
entry.dc:creator: Aktualności Steam

entry.title: Łatwiejsze przesyłanie prezentów
entry.content: Prezenty na Steam to popularny sposób wysyłania kopii gier i cyfrowych kart podarunkowych znajomym i rodzinie. Udostępniamy dziś pewne świetne nowe funkcje podnoszące wygodę przesyłania prezentów, ułatwiając przesyłanie zarówno cyfrowych kart podarunowych , jak i gier. Funkcje te idealnie pasują do kategorii list życzeń i innych usprawnień , które są również dostępne od teraz. Zakup jako gość W 2024 roku dodaliśmy opcję dokonywania zakupów jako gość, dzięki której członek rodziny lub znajomy moż

entry.title: ⚙ Scheme "H" — Helen
entry.content: There's one Helen in the Zone. But this time it's not so simple… Helen is the name given to the reactor's upper biological shield — scheme "H." Before the incident, it was a massive metal structure about 17 meters in diameter, through which fuel and control cables passed. A kind of head of the reactor, except weighing close to two thousand tons. entry.title: Discounts for P.O. Sukhoi’s Birthday!
entry.content: Pavel Osipovich Sukhoi was born on July 22nd 1895. In the early 1910s, while a student in Gomel, he witnessed a flight by the famous aviator Sergei Utochkin; he loved it so much that he decided to dedicate his life to aircraft design. During the 1920s and 1930s, he worked under the supervision of Andrei Tupolev, and after developing the BB-1 bomber, he was given his own design bureau. The BB-1 — designated the Su-2 — saw extensive use during the early stages of the Second World War. The Su-7 was

entry.title: The Elder Scrolls Online is already feeling the impact of Xbox's layoffs, ironically hurting the cash shop
entry.content: Earlier this month, Microsoft gutted The Elder Scrolls Online , with 379 staff across ZeniMax gone . And this is the second time it's happened in two years. As Harvey and I put it a few weeks ago, ESO's developers deserved better . The developer, now claiming to be the same size it was 10 years ago (similar to id Software), has just debuted ESO's new seasonal structure but will have to continue carving that path with reduced capabilities... Read more.
entry.dc:creator: PC Gamer

entry.title: Rocznicowy stream z sesją pytań i odpowiedzi na żywo
entry.content: Albion właśnie skończył dziewięć lat i gdy zamykamy kolejny, pełen wrażeń rok, jest to dobra okazja, by podsumować, jak daleką drogę przebyliśmy. Aby to uczynić, reżyser gry Moritz Bokelmann pojawi się na bardzo wyjątkowym, rocznicowym streamie w AlbionTV ( http://twitch.tv/albiononline ) ! 23 lipca o godzinie 19 UTC ekipa zbierze się, by porozmawiać o historii Albionu i spojrzeć na to, w jakim miejscu znajduje się obecnie. Sięgnijcie więc po kawałek Rocznicowego Tortu, przysuńcie krzesła i dołą

entry.content: Do you think they built the Sarcophagus to bury the fourth block? No. They built it so the fourth block wouldn't bury everything around it. entry.title: ZeroSpace Early Access is Now Live!
entry.content: ZeroSpace has officially launched in Early Access on Steam. The Orion Sector is open. entry.title: 🔩 Turbine Hall
entry.content: Youth have learned nothing; those schools nowadays are useless! It was the reactor itself that exploded. The Turbine Hall just happened to be right next to it, and it took the full brunt too: fire, debris, dust, and radiation, of course. The place was enormous — over four hundred meters long. Two turbines per unit, five hundred megawatts each. When they were running, there was no point in shouting because no one would have heard you. The floor shook, the pipes hummed, and cranes crawled overhead
entry.dc:creator: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl

entry.dc:creator: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl

entry.title: Operation Wags Event | PTO Development Report | Foothold Missions
entry.content: Dear Fighter Pilots, Partners and Friends, This week, the DCS community comes together in support of one of our own. Operation Wags is a community-wide charity event backing Matt "Wags" Wagner in his fight against bone marrow cancer, bringing together content creators, developers, and thousands of virtual pilots across two weekends: July 31st–August 2nd and August 7th–August 9th. Whether you fly, watch, or simply spread the word, every bit of support helps. Learn more below. Eighty-two years ago
entry.dc:creator: Steam News

entry.title: Coaches: New Vehicle Features
entry.content: As the development of the upcoming Coaches DLC for Euro Truck Simulator 2 advances, today, we'd like to show you some of the new vehicle features we have developed for this expansion. Let's take a look! Coaches feature a variety of systems and functions that trucks don't. So we needed to dive deeper and faithfully recreate new vehicle systems for the Coaches DLC, which we believe will enhance the driving experience and make every journey feel even more immersive when this expansion releases. entry.title: Through the Lens of STALZONE
entry.content: The old-timers say the Zone tells a different story to everyone who enters it. Some see endless firefights. Some see haunting beauty hidden behind anomalies. Others see the greatest movie never made. Which story will you tell? Create either: • vertical clip for TikTok or YouTube Shorts; • 1–5 minute cinematic if you want to put your directing skills to the test. entry.title: “What Awaits, Aleksey?” jest już dostępne!
entry.content: Drodzy Gracze. Po długim okresie przygotowań, testów, poprawek, raportów, przesłuchań, odszyfrowań, wewnętrznych notatek służbowych oraz licznych procedur, z dumą możemy poinformować Was, że “What Awaits, Aleksey?” jest już dostępne do kupienia na Steam! Od dziś możecie oficjalnie rozpocząć służbę w Biurze Szyfrów OKO jako Aleksy - młodszy analityk-kryptolog Republiki. Na wasze biurko trafią przejęte materiały dowodowe: fotografie, kartoteki, raporty, przechwycona korespondencja, nagrania z taśm
entry.dc:creator: Steam News

entry.title: Get the Scimitar Mk.2 in the Scimitar Strike Event!
entry.content: The history of the CVR(T) family of combat reconnaissance vehicles dates back to the 1960s. By tradition, they were given names starting with the letter “S”: Scorpion, Striker, Spartan, Samaritan, Sultan, and Samson. The seventh vehicle in the series was the Scimitar, named after the Middle Eastern saber, being fast and deadly. Get an upgraded version of the Scimitar along with themed decals and a decoration in this new ground vehicle event! From July 22nd (11:00 GMT) until August 5th (11:00 GMT
entry.dc:creator: Steam News

entry.title: GTA Online mimics reality by nerfing payouts after making everything cost more: 'Prices go up, paychecks go down'
entry.content: Making money in GTA Online has basically always been a game of whack-a-mole, with players finding the latest and greatest trick, and Rockstar promptly shutting the loophole down. With Grand Theft Auto 6 on the horizon, Rockstar has decided to nerf heists, which were one of the most popular ways to make a good buck in Los Santos... Read more.

entry.title: Castlevania: Belmont's Curse isn't technically connected to the Netflix anime, but its cinematography was inspired by the show
entry.content: When Konami revealed back in February that it's finally making a new Castlevania, the teaser trailer's art and color palette was so reminiscent of the Netflix anime series that it seemed possible the game was actually using the show's designs, or at least had gotten a little love from the folks at Powerhouse Animation . In a recent interview with PC Gamer, Konami confirmed there's no explicit continuity between the show and the new game, but the similarity was certainly intentional... Read more.
entry.dc:creator: PC Gamer

entry.title: Dear Van Gogh
entry.content: Three hearts, one infinite canvas, together we illuminate a starry night. Dear Van Gogh is an interactive journey through the life, art, and inner world of Vincent van Gogh. Travel inside his paintings to witness his earliest uncertainties, his Paris awakening, and the fragile beauty of his final years. Discover and feel the weight of a life lived, and the invisible hands that held it together. From the award-winning creators of Journey, join a global community and play through an unforgettable
entry.dc:creator: Steam News

entry.content: Hey Runners! 👋 Hope you guys are doing well. Our first update since launch! Exciting, isn't it?
